title: Rainbow Polka Dots Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 213cm) 1 Piece - Vibrant & Durable Tablecloth for Parties and Events, 84" x 54"
features: RECTANGULAR PLASTIC TABLE COVER: Designed to fit a variety of table sizes, our rainbow polka dots table cover protects surfaces from spills and stains while adding a pop of color to any event.
RAINBOW POLKA DOTS: Brighten your party atmosphere with our playful and vibrant rainbow polka dots design, perfect for celebrations like birthdays, baby showers, and pride events.
PERFECT SIZED: Generously sized to fit most tables, this versatile table cover easily drapes over rectangular surfaces, accommodating both indoor and outdoor settings.
ONE-PIECE CONVENIENCE: No need to buy multiple table covers or bother with cutting rolls – this single 137cm x 213cm piece provides complete coverage for stress-free event planning.

VIBRANT & DURABLE TABLECLOTH: Crafted from a durable plastic material, our rainbow polka dots table cover can withstand spills and messes while maintaining its vibrant design, making it a practical and stylish choice for parties and events.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lime Green Ruby Red Sunflower Yellow Powder Blue Rainbow Polka Dots Birthday Add-On Items These beautiful designs are sure to WOW your guests when celebrating your Birthday! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Rainbow Polka Dots isn't your taste, check out our other beautiful Birthday options. Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights!
